title: oglifa arizonica
intro: Oglifa arizonica, also known as Arizona globe-mallow, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Oglifa arizonica include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and can be found in some herbal supplements and remedies.
